headline: Ruben Amorim — update
body: BREAKING: AC Milan have announced Ruben Amorim as their new head coach 🚨 The former Manchester United boss replaces Massimiliano Allegri, who was sacked after failing to secure Champions League football. https://t.co/2yl6m3j8PF
text:
BREAKING: AC Milan have announced Ruben Amorim as their new head coach 🚨
 
The former Manchester United boss replaces Massimiliano Allegri, who was sacked after failing to secure Champions League football. https://t.co/2yl6m3j8PF
